mapper.select: SELECT S.WORKORDNO, S.WORKDAY AS ORDDATE, S.PROCESSCD, S.LOTNO, S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, W.ORDQTY, S.LOTQTY AS PRODQTY, S.LOTQTY AS GOODQTY, 0 AS DEFECTQTY, S.LOTSTATE, 1 AS WORKERCNT, S.LOTCREATIONDAY AS STARTDATE FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S JOIN TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W ON S.WORKORDNO = W.WORKORDNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE S.WORKORDNO = #{WORKORDNO} AND S.LOTSTATE != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY S.WORKDAY DESC, S.LOTNO DESC
